🔒 Private Journal    Unlock  if (localStorage.getItem("unlocked") === "true") {  document.getElementById("gate").style.display = "none";}function check() {  const pw = document.getElementById("pw").value;  if (pw === "1234") {    localStorage.setItem("unlocked", "true");    document.getElementById("gate").style.display = "none";  } else {    document.getElementById("msg").innerText = "wrong password";  }}
